name: AI Customer Support Ticket Automation v2
description: Production-grade AI workflow with xAI Grok as default LLM. Pipeline: ingest → spam detect → AI analysis → PII redact → route → workload-balanced agent assignment → KB RAG suggestions → persist → ack → audit → notify → escalation sweep → manual review → resolve. 16 database tables, 60+ REST endpoints, 7 frontend pages, Prometheus metrics, multi-channel notifications.

nodes.name: Email Trigger
nodes.description: Receives inbound emails via POST /webhooks/email (JSON), /webhooks/email/eml (.eml upload), /api/ingest (public demo), or /api/ingest/eml. Compatible with n8n Email Trigger, SendGrid Inbound Parse, Mailgun Routes.

config.auth: X-Webhook-Token or ?token= (EMAIL_WEBHOOK_TOKEN) for /webhooks/*; X-API-Key for /api/* when AUTH_ENABLED=true

nodes.name: Parse Email
nodes.description: Normalises webhook payload / .eml string into InboundEmail shape.

nodes.name: Validate Inbound
nodes.description: Validates sender email format, presence of subject/body, attachment size limits. Skipped messages are logged to inbox_log.

nodes.name: Spam Detection (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Calls AI (Grok-2-mini by default) with SYSTEM_PROMPT_SPAM to score 0-100. Above SPAM_AUTO_REJECT=90 → reject entirely (no ticket). Above SPAM_THRESHOLD=70 → flag as spam. Falls back to pattern-based mock.

nodes.name: Duplicate Detection
nodes.description: Computes fingerprint of subject+body, checks last 24h of tickets from same sender. If match, marks new ticket as duplicate_of=<existing>.

nodes.name: AI Analysis (Grok LLM)
nodes.description: Calls xAI Grok (default) or other OpenAI-compatible LLM with SYSTEM_PROMPT_ANALYZE. Returns full structured JSON: customer_name, company, issue_summary, detailed_description, category, priority, sentiment, product_service, suggested_department, suggested_tags, confidence_score, extraction_warnings, spam_score, language.

config.provider: xAI Grok (default) | OpenAI | Claude | Gemini | Groq | local

onError.action: retry 3× exponential backoff → fallback to mockAnalyze() → continue

nodes.name: Validate & Normalise AI Output
nodes.description: Coerces every field. Fuzzy-matches category, keyword-matches priority/sentiment, dedupes tags, validates language code. Ensures result is always persistable.

nodes.name: PII Redaction (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Replaces emails, phones, credit cards, SSNs, IBANs, IPs in body with [REDACTED_*] tokens. Stored separately in pii_redacted_body column.

nodes.name: Resolve Team + Best Agent (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Maps AI category to support team. Then finds the best agent on that team: fewest open tickets, matching skill, under max_concurrent cap.

nodes.name: Upsert Customer Profile (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Deterministic ID from email hash. Increments total_tickets/open_tickets, updates last_contact_at, name, company.

nodes.name: Persist Ticket
nodes.description: INSERT into tickets table with status=Open (or Spam), acknowledged=0, sla_due_at from priority SLA, customer_id, assigned_agent_id, language, is_spam, spam_score, pii_redacted_body. Captures raw AI response for audit.

nodes.name: Persist Attachments
nodes.description: Writes each attachment to uploads/<ticketId>/<uuid>-<safeName>. Path-traversal-safe.

nodes.name: KB Article Suggestions (RAG, NEW v2)
nodes.description: Scores all published KB articles by category match (30pts) + tag overlap (15pts/tag) + title keyword overlap (8pts) + body keyword overlap (1pts). Top 3 cached on ticket.ai_kb_article_ids.

nodes.name: Audit: created + classified + assigned
nodes.description: Appends rows to audit_trail. Append-only.

nodes.name: Send Acknowledgment Email
nodes.description: HTML + plain-text ack to customer with ticket ID, summary, category, priority, status, ETA. Logs to console when SMTP disabled.

nodes.name: Notifications (Slack/Teams/etc, NEW v2)
nodes.description: Fans out to configured channels: ticket_created (always), critical_priority (if Critical), spam_detected (if spam flagged). Each notification recorded in notifications table.

nodes.name: Manual Review (Web UI)
nodes.description: Agent opens ticket in dashboard. Can: edit fields, change status/priority/category, reassign team/agent, add notes, generate AI reply/resolution plans, escalate, merge duplicates. Every change audited.

nodes.name: AI Reply Suggestion (NEW v2)
nodes.description: On agent click, generates customer-facing reply grounded in suggested KB articles. Temperature 0.4.

nodes.name: AI Resolution Plan (NEW v2)
nodes.description: On agent click, generates agent-facing plan: diagnosis, ordered steps, effort, engineering flag, confidence. Cached on ticket.ai_resolution_suggestion.

nodes.name: Ticket Lifecycle Transitions
nodes.description: Open → In Progress (sets first_response_at) → Waiting for Customer → Resolved (sets resolved_at, notifies, decrements customer open count) → Closed. Rejected/Spam are terminal. Each transition audited.

nodes.name: Bulk Operations (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Mass-update status/priority/category/agent, bulk-close, bulk-tag, CSV export, JSON import. All operations audited with actor=system:bulk or agent:<id>.

nodes.name: SLA Escalation Sweeper (NEW v2, scheduled)
nodes.description: Runs every 5min (configurable). Finds tickets whose sla_due_at has passed. Escalates through 3 levels: L1=notify team, L2=notify lead, L3=notify admins. Each escalation recorded in escalations table + audit_trail + notifications table.

nodes.name: Metrics Endpoint (NEW v2)
nodes.description: GET /api/metrics returns Prometheus exposition format with counters (tickets_created_total, ai_calls_total, etc.) and gauges (open tickets by priority/team, escalated_open).

nodes.name: Reports & Analytics (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Time-series (created vs resolved per day), agent leaderboard, team workload, SLA compliance by priority, sentiment trend, spam stats, response/resolution times. Exposed via /api/reports/*.

nodes.name: Customer 360 (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Aggregates all tickets from same email into a 360 view: profile + tickets + sentiment trend + stats. Exposed via GET /api/customers/:email.

nodes.name: Knowledge Base CRUD (NEW v2)
nodes.description: Markdown articles with FTS5 search. CRUD via /api/kb. View count + helpful count. Used by AI Reply Suggestion and AI Resolution Plan prompts.

nodes.name: Agent Directory + API Keys (NEW v2)
nodes.description: CRUD agents, issue/revoke SHA-256-hashed API keys, role-based access control (admin/agent/viewer), workload metrics.

credentials.name: GROK_API_KEY (or AI_API_KEY)
credentials.description: xAI Grok API key (starts with xai-) or any OpenAI-compatible key
